label: capability search • run shell script
notes: Tracking-only by POLICY DECISION (affirmed 2026-06-19, W3). `sandbox_exec` is excluded from the search index by ToolIndexService.syncFromRegistry (runtimeManagedToolNames). The exclusion is correct and stays: runtime-managed tools are auto-exposed by the prompt composer when their owning agent flag is on and have NO capabilities_load carve-out, so surfacing `sandbox_exec` in capability search would advertise a capability the discovery/load path can't action (the model would find it but never be able to load it). We deliberately do NOT index it and do NOT rewrite the case to a different tool (that would change what the case proves) — it stays a documented red, excluded from recall_floors.json on purpose. Resolution would require un-excluding runtime-managed tools from the index, which is a separate product decision outside retrieval tuning.
